healthcare.title: Healthcare Solutions
healthcare.subtitle: HIPAA-Compliant Patient Care Systems
healthcare.description: We engineer secure, high-speed, and regulatory-compliant digital platforms for modern healthcare providers. We help medical practices streamline scheduling, automate administrative flows, and improve patient retention.

solutions.title: Appointment Booking Systems
solutions.description: Automated doctor calendar syncing with real-time slot confirmations, custom SMS reminders via Twilio, and multi-location management.

solutions.title: Patient Dashboards & Portals
solutions.description: Secure portals for patients to submit intake details, review lab reports, request prescription refills, and message practitioners.

solutions.title: Healthcare CRM Systems
solutions.description: Centralized database mapping patient journeys, pipeline intake, practitioner tasks, and automated insurance pre-verifications.

process.title: Workflow Mapping
process.description: Analyzing your medical reception and clinician pipelines to identify operational friction.

process.title: Compliance & Audit
process.description: Ensuring data storage, transmission, and roles strictly meet HIPAA and encryption standards.

process.title: Custom Engineering
process.description: Developing fast frontends and secure DB frameworks, with stress tests for database loads.

faqs.question: Are your healthcare solutions HIPAA-compliant?
faqs.answer: Yes. We build using secure database integrations, AWS KMS encryption at rest, HTTPS/SSL in transit, and role-based permissions to guarantee HIPAA compliance.

faqs.question: Can you integrate with existing EHR systems?
faqs.answer: Yes. We regularly connect custom frontends and dashboards to legacy EHRs like Epic, Cerner, or Athenahealth using custom APIs or FHIR standards.

real-estate.title: Real Estate Solutions
real-estate.subtitle: High-Impact Listing & Map Portals
real-estate.description: We construct bespoke map-driven listing platforms and automated lead routing systems for luxury brokerages and property developers. We transform real estate portfolios into immersive, high-converting digital portals.

solutions.title: Bespoke Property Sites
solutions.description: Cinematic property galleries, virtual walkthrough integrations, and responsive floorplans optimized for $10M+ luxury listings.

solutions.title: Lead Management Pipelines
solutions.description: Instant contact notifications, automated agent assignments, and customer profiles showing property interest logs.

solutions.title: Custom Real Estate CRM
solutions.description: Centralized dashboard for tracking listings, scheduling private tours, storing contracts, and cataloging buyer preferences.

process.title: UX Wireframing
process.description: Designing maps and galleries that respect high-net-worth buyers' time.

process.title: API Integrations
process.description: Mapping third-party MLS databases and loading custom Mapbox map overlays.

process.title: Polished Launch
process.description: Optimizing images and utilizing CDNs for fast loading across mobile connections.

faqs.question: Do you support MLS feed integrations?
faqs.answer: Yes. We integrate RETS or RESO Web API feeds to automatically import, normalize, and update listing inventories directly on your website.

faqs.question: How fast do listing pages load?
faqs.answer: By using Next.js static generation (SSG) and automatic image compression on Vercel's CDN, property listing pages load in under 1.5 seconds, even with heavy photos.

restaurants.title: Restaurant Systems
restaurants.subtitle: Direct-to-Consumer Food Platforms
restaurants.description: Stop paying 30% third-party aggregator commission fees. We build custom, commission-free online ordering apps, smart QR code menus, and automated delivery system integrations for restaurants.

solutions.title: Direct Online Ordering
solutions.description: Streamlined shopping carts, delivery radius checkers, and custom credit card/Apple Pay checkout flows.

solutions.title: Smart QR Menus
solutions.description: Zero-latency in-browser menus, allowing customers to view, filter allergens, and order directly from tables.

solutions.title: Fulfillment & POS Integrations
solutions.description: Automated order printing and syncing with POS machines like Toast, Square, or Clover, plus local courier routing.

process.title: Menu Schema Design
process.description: Setting up customizable nested structures for item modifications, sizes, and addons.

process.title: Payment Configuration
process.description: Integrating Stripe or Square for payouts, ensuring PCI-compliant checkout transactions.

process.title: Staff Onboarding
process.description: Deploying the order screen interface to kitchen tablets with real-time sound cues.

faqs.question: What is the fee per transaction on our custom system?
faqs.answer: You only pay the standard Stripe card processing fees (typically 2.9% + $0.30). We charge zero commission or per-order fees, saving you thousands monthly.

faqs.question: Does this work on mobile devices?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our systems are built mobile-first, ensuring customers can order, input delivery instructions, and pay with Apple Pay/Google Pay in seconds.

education.title: Education Platforms
education.subtitle: Next-Gen Learning Management Systems
education.description: We develop custom learning management systems (LMS), interactive student portals, and scheduling tools for schools, course creators, and corporate training divisions.

solutions.title: Interactive LMS Portals
solutions.description: Custom course outlines, video players with progress counters, document downloads, and quizzes.

solutions.title: Student & Admin Dashboards
solutions.description: Portals showing grade logs, course progress bars, assignment queues, and upcoming lectures.

solutions.title: Classroom Scheduling Systems
solutions.description: Real-time class booking, automated teacher availability grids, and virtual video room integrations.

process.title: Curriculum Mapping
process.description: Designing user pathways that align with student learning goals.

process.title: Media Infrastructure
process.description: Setting up secure, high-speed CDN video streaming (Mux, AWS CloudFront) to prevent piracy.

process.title: Interactive Features
process.description: Coding quiz systems, grading dashboards, and auto-certificate generators.

faqs.question: How do you protect course videos from being downloaded?
faqs.answer: We use signed URLs, encrypted HLS streaming via Mux or AWS, and disable standard browser video menus to prevent content copying.

faqs.question: Can the portal scale to handle thousands of concurrent students?
faqs.answer: Yes. We build on serverless infrastructures that scale up instantly to accommodate traffic spikes during exam or course launch hours.

startups.title: Startup Launches
startups.subtitle: Rapid MVP Design & Development
startups.description: We help venture-backed founders define, design, and build high-quality MVPs. We build clean, production-ready code that satisfies early investors and scales seamlessly with early user growth.

solutions.title: Agile MVP Engineering
solutions.description: Fast-tracked building of core validation features, focusing on getting you to market in under 12 weeks.

solutions.title: SaaS Launch Frameworks
solutions.description: Configuring auth, billing, database setups, and webhooks in a clean repository ready for in-house handover.

solutions.title: Pitch & Demo Interfaces
solutions.description: High-fidelity mockups and interactive prototypes designed to impress venture capital investors.

process.title: Product Strategy
process.description: Scoping down the product to the absolute core features to validate market fit.

process.title: Rapid Sprint Build
process.description: Fortnightly code deliveries with working software available on staging URLs.

process.title: Handover & Support
process.description: Complete codebase documentation, database schemas, and transition support for your hires.

faqs.question: How fast can you build a working MVP?
faqs.answer: Our standard startup package delivers a fully functional, secure MVP with database, user auth, and payment processing in 8 to 12 weeks.

faqs.question: Will we need to rewrite the code later?
faqs.answer: No. We build utilizing production-grade frameworks (TypeScript, Next.js, Postgres) so your internal team can easily build on top of our code as you grow.
